data.name: Femboy Survival
data.detailed_description:
Femboy Survival is an erotic action-survival game where you play as a cute yet determined femboy, trying to resist a world overrun by magical lust. Your mission: survive endless waves of horny enemies (mostly futanari), collect powerful items, unlock abilities — and keep your innocence intact.

Set in a universe under a constant spell of desire, the game blends fast-paced gameplay with corruption mechanics, fetish-themed power-ups, and colorful visuals. While everyone else seems to have given in to pleasure, the protagonist embarks on a journey to resist temptation and purify the corruption that's taken over the world.

🧩 Features included in the current version:

  • ⚔️ Wave-based dynamic combat with spells, buffs, debuffs, and unique bosses.🧠 Attribute system and skill checks that influence dialogue and outcomes.

  • 🧥 Equipment and items with visual and mechanical effects, displayed on a 2D interactive paper doll.

  • 💋 Branching dialogue and fetish interactions with explicit adult content.

  • 🌟 Unlockable gallery featuring adult scenes earned through gameplay.

  • 🔊 Partial voice acting for main characters and original soundtrack.

  • 🏳️‍🌈 Fetish-focused content including futanari, submission, light BDSM, and moral corruption.

  • 📈 Progression based on choice: fight or seduce — you decide how to move forward.

With a mix of humor, tactical combat, and themed eroticism, Femboy Survival delivers a provocative experience with personality — ideal for players looking for a more stylish and deep adult game.

data.short_description: Femboy Survival is an erotic action game where you play as a cute yet determined femboy trying to survive a world overtaken by magical lust. Survive waves of horny enemies (mostly futanari), collect items, and unlock abilities while keeping your innocence.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-3220 or AMD FX-4300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000 / NVIDIA GT 710 / AMD Radeon R5 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit) or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
